summary: The user is preparing to attend a party at Mike's place next weekend and seeks advice on what to bring. They decide to make Spinach and Artichoke Dip and create a to-do list for the week leading up to the party. The user also plans to reach out to their friend Michael to catch up after a canceled meeting.
facts: The user is planning to attend a party at Mike's place next weekend. The user had lunch with Rachel at a new restaurant last Friday. The user and Rachel met Mike at the restaurant. The user exchanged numbers with a guy named Mike who was sitting at the table next to them. The user is making Spinach and Artichoke Dip for the party. The Spinach and Artichoke Dip takes 15-25 minutes to prepare and serves 8-12 people. The user created a to-do list for the week leading up to the party. The user plans to reach out to their friend Michael to check in after a canceled meeting.
